description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure with a rectangular footprint and a modern, open-plan interior layout. The exterior features large, evenly spaced windows along the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is flat, contributing to a contemporary architectural style, and the walls are finished in a light, neutral color. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including what appears to be a spacious central living area, several bedrooms, and utility spaces. There are no visible porches or verandas, and the entryway is subtly integrated into the facade. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a connection to the outdoors through extensive glazing.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious, open-plan interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows and the central living area visible through the glazing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure and the arrangement of interior rooms along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows and the open-plan living space extending toward the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the segmented room layout and the absence of exterior porches.
